misc.title: 今日のドット絵。 （仕事がひと段落するとはじまるコーナー） 今回は現在 個人的にどハマり中の「ロトの紋章」よりアルスくん。（初期） ドラクエのHD2D風味に仕上げみました。 いや〜、ロトの紋章は名作だねぇ。 異魔人様！

misc.title: Los de la FIA llegando al circuito de Madrid: Video Motorsportive (@MotorsportiveHQ) 🚨 NEW MADRID F1 CIRCUIT FACES TIGHT DEADLINE Construction is RACING AGAINST TIME for a September debut. 👉 Faces s
misc.text: Los de la FIA llegando al circuito de Madrid: Video Motorsportive (@MotorsportiveHQ) 🚨 NEW MADRID F1 CIRCUIT FACES TIGHT DEADLINE Construction is RACING AGAINST TIME for a September debut. 👉 Faces skepticism from locals and significant challenges to pass FIA inspection. The unique street circuit's scale adds to the pressure. — https://nitter.net/MotorsportiveHQ/status/2036119075106013642#m

misc.title: Lo bueno de OLIVER Y BENJI: CAMPEONES era su realismo. Además de plasmar jugadas de fútbol de manera veraz, también veíamos momentos como este, en el que Oliver puede ver a Benji a kilómetros de dista
misc.text: Lo bueno de OLIVER Y BENJI: CAMPEONES era su realismo. Además de plasmar jugadas de fútbol de manera veraz, también veíamos momentos como este, en el que Oliver puede ver a Benji a kilómetros de distancia y logra, de un chute, hacerle llegar un mensaje escrito en un balón: Video

misc.title: ¿Qué escena de Torrente exactamente le pones a tu hijo, @NunezFeijoo? ¿La de la 3, cuando vi0la analmente a una drogadicta dormida? ¿La 2, cuando su tío vende droga a una menor a cambio de sus braguit
misc.text: ¿Qué escena de Torrente exactamente le pones a tu hijo, @NunezFeijoo? ¿La de la 3, cuando vi0la analmente a una drogadicta dormida? ¿La 2, cuando su tío vende droga a una menor a cambio de sus braguitas? ¿O la 4 cuando chantajea a una novia con una mamada? ¿O la de la chinita? elDiario.es (@eldiarioes) Feijóo sobre los últimos estrenos de Almodóvar y Santiago Segura: “Mi hijo ve las de 'Torrente'” eldiario.es/politica/ultima-… — https://nitter.net/eldiarioes/status/2036392317091737625#m

misc.title: Did Saturn lose his legs during the war of the Void Century? When he died in the manga, we only saw his skull and torso. In the anime, they made a point of showing the skeleton had no leg bones. Could
misc.text: Did Saturn lose his legs during the war of the Void Century? When he died in the manga, we only saw his skull and torso. In the anime, they made a point of showing the skeleton had no leg bones. Could this be why Imu had granted him a spider-type Devil Fruit? It would be very similar to Ceaser's operations at Punk Hazard.

misc.title: Could Law’s immortal surgery, much like his heart operation, remove a portion of someone’s soul? This soul fragment, according to the Claíomh Solais lore, could be placed within an object - or even an
misc.text: Could Law’s immortal surgery, much like his heart operation, remove a portion of someone’s soul? This soul fragment, according to the Claíomh Solais lore, could be placed within an object - or even an animal! What if the Gorosei have done this, and this is why they can’t be killed!

items.title: Did Saturn lose his legs during the war of the Void Century? When he died in the manga, we only saw his skull and torso. In the anime, they made a point of showing the skeleton had no leg bones. Could
items.text: Did Saturn lose his legs during the war of the Void Century? When he died in the manga, we only saw his skull and torso. In the anime, they made a point of showing the skeleton had no leg bones. Could this be why Imu had granted him a spider-type Devil Fruit? It would be very similar to Ceaser's operations at Punk Hazard.
